description: The ColorXMemberEditor component is used in inspectors and Ref Hacking to edit ColorX Fields and their UIX elements.

fields.Continuous: Whether updates to the target are continuous.
fields._path: Usually "r" "g" "b" "a" to edit parts of the colorX value.
fields.Vertical: Whether the inspector showing this component is showing it in a vertical fashion.
fields._colorDrive: The field to drive with the colorX color for the inspector visual.
fields._colorDriveNoAlpha: The field to drive with the colorX target with no alpha applied for the inspector visual.
fields._colorDialog: The color dialogue currently being used to edit the color.

methods.OpenColorPicker: Handles spawning the user's favorite color picker so they can edit this component's target color.
